title: Tyler Hayward
content:
{{Character ||image = Tyler Hayward.png |real name = Tyler Hayward |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |snapped = No{{Ref|WV104}} |title = Acting Director of [[S.W.O.R.D.]] (formerly) |affiliation = {{Affiliation|SWD}} (formerly) |tv series = ''[[WandaVision]]'' (6 episodes) |actor = [[Josh Stamberg]] |status = In Custody}} {{Quote|There is no time for you to diminish [[Darcy Lewis|your]] [[Monica Rambeau|colleagues]] when you’re about to start a war you can’t win."
"[[Scarlet Witch|Maximoff]] was never gonna negotiate with us. We take her out, this [[Westview Anomaly|whole nightmare]] ends.|[[Jimmy Woo]] and Tyler Hayward|All-New Halloween Spooktacular!}} '''Tyler Hayward''' is a former high-ranking [[S.W.O.R.D.]] operative who was promoted to acting director following the [[Snap]] and [[Maria Rambeau]]'s death. In his tenure, Hayward focused S.W.O.R.D.'s efforts from their extraterrestrial operations onto artificial intelligence and sentient weapons. In [[2023]], Hayward intended to reconstruct [[Vision]] into a [[White Vision|sentient weapon]], to this end, Hayward led an operation into the investigation of an [[Westview Anomaly|energy field]] surrounding the town of [[Westview]], which was under the control of [[Wanda Maximoff]]. Having acquired several traces of Maximoff's [[Magic#Chaos Magic|magic]] to resurrect Vision, Hayward intended to have Maximoff and her family killed to cover up his activities. However, his plans were foiled by [[Jimmy Woo]] and [[Darcy Lewis]], and he was subsequently arrested by the [[FBI]] for his crimes. ==Biography== ===Director of S.W.O.R.D.=== ====Surviving the Snap==== {{Quote|You people who [[Snap|left]], still have the luxury of optimism. You have no idea what it was like. What it took to keep the lights on.|Tyler Hayward to [[Monica Rambeau]]|All-New Halloween Spooktacular!}} Tyler Hayward was an agent of [[S.W.O.R.D.]] for years, working with S.W.O.R.D. Director [[Maria Rambeau]] and her daughter [[Monica Rambeau|Monica]] until she, alongside many others, disappeared due to the [[Snap]]. Hayward was among those that had survived, as was Maria, who provided guidelines on how to proceed if those taken in the Snap were to ever return.{{Ref|WV104}} Hayward struggled, along with many others, during this time, as it was hard to live with half of the population gone.{{Ref|WV106}} In [[2020]], Maria died of complications with cancer, leaving Hayward the acting director in her place. During his time as director, he shifted the focus of the organization from focusing on the extraterrestrial to instead developing robotics, nanotechnology, and artificial intelligence.{{Ref|WV104}} ===[[Project Cataract]]=== ====Encountering Wanda Maximoff==== [[File:Tyler Hayward & Wanda Maximoff.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward letting [[Wanda Maximoff]] see [[Vision]]]] {{Quote|We're dismantling the most sophisticated, sentient weapon ever made."
"But [[Vision]]'s not a weapon. You can't do this."
"In fact, it is our legal and ethical obligation.|Tyler Hayward and [[Wanda Maximoff]]|Previously On}} In [[2023]], two weeks after the [[Blip]], Hayward allowed [[Wanda Maximoff]] to meet with him in his office. After she had barged into his office, she demanded to see [[Vision]]'s body. Hayward tried to tell her she could not have him back, as she wanted to have a funeral, and ended up taking her to the laboratory where his agents were dissecting Vision's corpse. Maximoff asked why they were doing that only for him to tell her that he was [[S.W.O.R.D.]]'s property. Enraged, Maximoff broke the glass wall separating them and flew down. After the agents drew their weapons, Hayward called off their fire and watched as Maximoff had her time with Vision, before leaving. After this, Hayward had the video footage edited making it appear that Maximoff stormed the [[S.W.O.R.D. Headquarters|facility]] and stole Vision's body.{{Ref|WV108}} ====Monica Rambeau's Return==== [[File:THayward-FirstScene.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward is reunited with [[Monica Rambeau]]]] {{Quote|Lost half my personnel in the [[Snap|Blip]] and half of those remaining have lost their nerve. The program hasn't been the same since you've been up there, Rambeau.|Tyler Hayward to [[Monica Rambeau]]|We Interrupt This Program}} Hayward greeted [[Monica Rambeau]] when she returned to [[S.W.O.R.D. Headquarters]] to continue her work for the organization. He informed her that, as part of the guidelines [[Maria Rambeau]] devised on how to handle vanished personnel, her mother had ordered that she not participate in extraterrestrial missions. Hayward then sent Rambeau to investigate the [[Westview Anomaly|anomaly]] in [[Westview]], [[New Jersey]] after the [[FBI]] had asked for assistance.{{Ref|WV104}} ====[[Westview Anomaly]]==== [[File:Woo with Hayward.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward dismisses [[Jimmy Woo]]'s concerns]] {{Quote|These sewers will take you straight into [[Westview|town]]. Try to find anything you can on [[Monica Rambeau|Rambeau]]."
"Copy that.|Tyler Hayward and Agent [[Franklin]]|We Interrupt This Program}} Following [[Monica Rambeau]] getting sucked inside of the [[Westview Anomaly]], Hayward arrived at the [[S.W.O.R.D. Response Base]] to lead the investigation. Hayward led a manned expedition into Westview, selecting Agent [[Franklin]] to go through the sewer system and emerge in the town in search for Rambeau. [[Jimmy Woo]] voiced his concerns about the operation, but Hayward dismissed them. Suddenly, they overheard laughter, which came from a television broadcast, originating from inside the energy field, and was being watched by [[Darcy Lewis]]. They noticed that the broadcast featured [[Wanda Maximoff]] and [[Vision/Chaos Magic Recreation|Vision]] in a 50's sitcom, much to their confusion, especially as [[Vision]] was dead. Hayward questioned Lewis about the nature of this sudden broadcast, to which she explained that she detected a high level of CMBR entwined with a broadcast frequency coming off the energy field. When Hayward realized this was the same radiation used in the [[Big Bang]], he ordered his agents to analyze the broadcast. Hayward would be present as Rambeau was cast out of [[Westview]], with her explaining that it was [[Wanda Maximoff]] who was the cause of the anomaly.{{Ref|WV104}} ====New Revelations==== [[File:WV - First Person Intel.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward debriefing the [[S.W.O.R.D.]] team]] {{Quote|We now have first-person intel from inside the [[Westview]] Anomaly. Our initial theory had [[Wanda Maximoff]] as one of many victims. We now know she is the principal victimizer.|Tyler Hayward|On a Very Special Episode...}} Hayward escorted [[Monica Rambeau]] into the [[S.W.O.R.D.]] base, where Hayward would ask her what it was like being under Maximoff's control. Rambeau would describe it as excruciating and terrifying, and that it felt like drowning. Hayward then left to give the agents a debriefing on the situation, with Rambeau, [[Darcy Lewis]], and [[Jimmy Woo]] arriving shortly after. Hayward explained the scenario, saying that while [[Wanda Maximoff]] was initially believed to be a victim of the anomaly, she was actually the cause. After Woo gave some backstory on Maximoff, Hayward would point out her involvement in the [[Attack in Lagos|Lagos Catastrophe]] and the [[Battle at Leipzig-Halle Airport|Clash]] of the [[Avengers]] in [[Germany]], as well as the fact that she initially worked with [[Hydra]] and [[Ultron]] against the [[Avengers]]. Rambeau would defend Maximoff, to which Hayward would recall her description of being under her control. Hayward would continue to argue with Rambeau over Maximoff's motives, until Hayward showed everyone footage he recently got permission to share of Maximoff visiting the [[S.W.O.R.D. Headquarters]], manipulating it to look like she broke in and stole the [[Vision]]'s corpse. Hayward then dismissed everyone, ordering them to work the problem.{{Ref|WV105}} ====Confrontation with Wanda Maximoff==== {{Quote|You won't bother me. I won't bother you."
"I wish it could be that simple. You've taken an entire [[Westview|town]] hostage."
"Well, I'm not the one with the guns, Director.|[[Wanda Maximoff]] and Tyler Hayward|On a Very Special Episode...}} Hayward ordered that a [[S.W.O.R.D. Drone]] be sent into [[Westview]], with a missile embedded inside of it to kill [[Wanda Maximoff]]. While the Drone was being controlled by [[Monica Rambeau]], she had used the drone's speaker to communicate with Maximoff, insisting that they only wanted to talk, unaware that the drone contained within it a missile. Hayward would watch a screen displaying the drone's camera's view as Maximoff's eyes glowed red, at which point Hayward ordered a nearby agent to take the shot, but before they could the drone would lose connection. The agent had then informed Hayward that the base had been breached. [[File:WandaVision 32.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward investigates the [[Scarlet Witch|breach]] at the [[Hex]]]] Hayward, Rambeau, and a team of armed [[S.W.O.R.D.]] agents arrived at the edge of the [[Westview Anomaly]], where they watched on as Maximoff emerged from the anomaly, holding the deactivated S.W.O.R.D. Drone in her hand. Maximoff threw the Drone at the agents, angrily asking if it was theirs. Hayward explained that the missile in the drone was just a precaution, saying that she could not blame them for it given her recent actions. Maximoff told Hayward that this would be their only warning and to leave her alone. However, Hayward refused, saying she had taken an entire town hostage. While Rambeau failed to negotiate with her, Maximoff had then used her powers to make the S.W.O.R.D. agents aim their weapons at Hayward, before re-entering Westview, as Hayward desperately ordered his men to stand down. Upon her departure, the agents regained their senses and put their weapons down.{{Ref|WV105}} ====Reprimanding Monica Rambeau==== {{Quote|Maybe it’s a good thing [[Monica Rambeau|you]] weren't here when your [[Maria Rambeau|mother]] died. Because clearly you don't have the stomach for this job. Get her off my [[S.W.O.R.D. Response Base|base]]. Now. [[Darcy Lewis|All]] [[Jimmy Woo|of them]].|Tyler Hayward to [[Monica Rambeau]]|All-New Halloween Spooktacular!}} Returning to [[S.W.O.R.D. Response Base|base]] having ordered a full analysis of the dismantled [[S.W.O.R.D. Drone|drone]], Hayward's actions to send the drone were chastised by [[Monica Rambeau]]. Furthermore, [[Darcy Lewis]] snarkily mocked Hayward upon his arrival as a result of [[Wanda Maximoff]] controlling his men to aim at him. Annoyed with the both of them, Hayward began diminishing her and Rambeau, only to be countered by [[Jimmy Woo]]. Hayward attempted to justify his actions as necessary, believing Maximoff could not be reasoned with, and killing her would have been the most sufficient course of action. Rambeau protested Hayward's logic, explaining that their limited knowledge of the [[Hex]] would lead to unpredictable consequences, and provoking her was only going to make the situation worse. Hayward dismissed Rambeau's optimism of a mutual agreement between [[S.W.O.R.D.]] and Maximoff, arguing her bias with super-powered peoples such as [[Captain Marvel]], and her naïveté as a result of being a victim of the [[Snap]] had hindered mission progress. When Rambeau called out Hayward's actions as cowardly, Hayward reprimanded her, reminding her of [[Maria Rambeau]]'s death, and ordered his agents to escort Rambeau, Woo and Lewis off base grounds.{{Ref|WV106}} ====Expansion of the Hex==== {{Quote|Come in, anyone read me? Anyone hear my voice? Does anyone read me? Does anyone read me, over?|Tyler Hayward|All-New Halloween Spooktacular!}} Unbeknownst to Hayward, his private database, including confidential information on [[Project Cataract]], was being searched through by [[Darcy Lewis]]. Hayward was alerted of another breach in the [[Hex]], this time from [[Vision]] himself, who was curious as to what was beyond the Hex's boundaries. Hayward watched as Vision helplessly struggled to stand up, slowly beginning to disintegrate and being sucked back into the Hex. [[File:Hayward & Rodriguez.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward at the [[S.W.O.R.D. Retreat Base]]]] When [[Billy Maximoff]] informed [[Wanda Maximoff]] that Vision was in danger, she slowly expanded the Hex to save him from death. Hayward could only watch as this phenomenon was occurring in front of his eyes, before realizing he was in imminent danger as well. Hayward signaled all of his agents to evacuate, and sped off in an SUV with [[Rodriguez (S.W.O.R.D.)|Rodriguez]]. As [[S.W.O.R.D.]] agents were being enveloped into the Hex, Hayward barely managed to escape the expanding border, desperately reaching out for any active S.W.O.R.D. units.{{Ref|WV106}} Having gotten to safety, Hayward and his agents stationed themselves a few miles outside of the Hex at the [[S.W.O.R.D. Retreat Base]].{{Ref|WV107}} ====Reassembling Vision==== [[File:Director Tyler Hayward.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward recommissions [[White Vision|Vision]] back online]] {{Quote|We took this [[White Vision|thing]] apart and put it back together again a million times. Tried every type of power supply under the [[Sun|sun]], when all we needed was a [[Magic#Chaos Magic|little energy]] directly from the [[Scarlet Witch|source]].|Tyler Hayward to [[Rodriguez (S.W.O.R.D.)|Rodriguez]]|Previously On}} Hayward and his team discovered the energy from the [[Westview Anomaly]] was compatible with [[Vision]]'s body, and repurposed the [[S.W.O.R.D. Drone]] that went in the Anomaly for Vision, successfully reactivating him after numerous failed attempts, as Hayward looked at the [[White Vision]] as he awoke.{{Ref|WV108}} ====Final Standoff and Arrest==== [[File:Hayward's Plan.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward speaks to [[Jimmy Woo]]]] {{Quote|No one's gonna care once I've eliminated [[Wanda Maximoff]]. They'll believe that the [[White Vision|Vision]] who emerges from the [[Westview]] rubble is the [[Vision/Chaos Magic Recreation|same one]] she illegally tried to bring back to life. They'll thank me for recovering such a valuable asset.|Tyler Hayward to [[Jimmy Woo]]|The Series Finale}} When Hayward's agents found [[Jimmy Woo]], they brought him to the [[S.W.O.R.D. Retreat Base]] where he met with Hayward. Hayward told him about his plan to get rid of Maximoff by using [[Vision]]. Woo threatened him by calling the [[FBI]], although Hayward merely had his agents tie Woo up. Hayward then waited for his plan to carry out. As the [[Hex]] opened up, Hayward and his agents drove their Humvees into [[Westview]] to the town square. There they surrounded [[Wanda Maximoff]], [[Vision/Chaos Magic Recreation|Vision]], [[Billy Maximoff]], and [[Tommy Maximoff]]. Hayward witnessed Maximoff leaving to fight [[Agatha Harkness]], leaving her boys to tend to his agents, but became angry after his agents got outsmarted by the boys. [[File:Hayward tries to murder children.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward shoots at [[Tommy Maximoff|Tommy]] and [[Billy Maximoff]]]] Hayward got out of his Humvee and aimed his gun at the two boys, firing at them. However, the shots were stopped by [[Monica Rambeau]] who stepped out in front of Billy and Tommy, except one bullet went past her, but was thrown to the ground by Billy. [[File:Hayward glares at Darcy.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward is stopped by [[Darcy Lewis]]]] Hayward jumped into another Humvee and prepared to drive into them, but his Humvee got rammed into by a food truck driven by [[Darcy Lewis]]. Hayward glared at Lewis, realizing that he was going to be arrested. [[File:Hayward arrested.png|{{AltFloat}}|Hayward is arrested]] Following the dispelling of the Hex, the FBI and the [[Eastview Sheriff's Office|Eastview Sheriff's Department]] came into Westview and arrested Hayward, while Woo and his FBI allies took over the Westview investigation.{{Ref|WV109}} {{Clear}} ==Abilities== *'''Master Tactician''': As the head of [[S.W.O.R.D.]], Hayward was very intelligent in forming plans. During the [[Westview Anomaly]], Hayward planned on sending a drone through the [[Hex]]. Despite everyone's plans to stop [[Wanda Maximoff]]. Hayward wanted her killed and secretly planted weapons in the drones. When this didn't work, he waited until the Hex opened to send his men in and kill her. He also masked the truth of wanting to recreate [[Vision]] as a weapon. *'''Marksman''': Hayward is capable on wielding and shooting firearms with sufficient accuracy, for he would have killed [[Tommy Maximoff|Tommy]] and [[Billy Maximoff]] if [[Monica Rambeau]] had not intervened. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''Glock 17''': [[File:Hayward shoots at children.png|thumb|250px|Hayward firing his gun at the twins]] Hayward used a Glock 17 to shoot at [[Tommy Maximoff|Tommy]] and [[Billy Maximoff]] during the [[Battle of Westview]]. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[S.W.O.R.D. Drone]]''': Hayward used a [[Stark Industries]] drone to fly into Westview and fire at [[Wanda Maximoff]]. After Wanda disarmed it, she brought it out of Westview and threw it back at Hayward. Afterwards, his agents used the drone to power [[White Vision]]. ===Vehicles=== *'''[[Humvee]]''': Hayward drove a Humvee into [[Westview]] and to the town square. His Humvee was later damaged by [[Darcy Lewis]] driving a food truck. ==Facilities== {{Expand}} *'''[[S.W.O.R.D. Headquarters]]''': ''To be added'' *'''[[S.W.O.R.D. Response Base]]''': ''To be added'' *'''[[S.W.O.R.D. Retreat Base]]''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[S.W.O.R.D.]] - Former Subordinates **[[Maria Rambeau]] † - Predecessor **[[Monti]] **[[Rodriguez (S.W.O.R.D.)|Rodriguez]] **[[Hutch]] **[[Franklin]] **[[DeMarco]] *[[United States Air Force]] **[[Webb]] *[[White Vision]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Monica Rambeau]] - Former Subordinate *[[Scarlet Witch|Wanda Maximoff/Scarlet Witch]] † - Target *[[Hex]] **[[Vision/Chaos Magic Recreation|Vision]] † **[[Billy Maximoff]] - Attempted Victim **[[Tommy Maximoff]] - Attempted Victim *[[FBI]] **[[Jimmy Woo]] - Former Ally *[[Darcy Lewis]] - Former Ally *[[Agatha Harkness]] † *[[Eastview Sheriff's Office]] {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|WV108}} (flashbacks) *{{Appearance|WV104}} *{{Appearance|WV105}} *{{Appearance|WV106}} *{{Appearance|WV107}} *{{Appearance|WV108}} *{{Appearance|WV109}} ==Trivia== *Hayward bears some similarities to '''Cameron Brock''', a director of a government organization who led an effort to dismantle [[Vision]], which ended up rendering him white. ==Behind the Scenes== *Upon signing on to play Tyler Hayward in ''[[WandaVision]]'', [[Josh Stamberg]] requested [[Marvel Studios]] to not kill off his character, having interest in reprising his role in the future.[https://www.etonline.com/josh-stamberg-on-operation-varsity-blues-and-wandavision-theories-exclusive-162607 'WandaVision' Star Josh Stamberg Would Be Surprised If Hayward Doesn't Show Up Again (Exclusive)] *[[Remington Steele]] was a stunt double for [[Josh Stamberg]] in the role of Tyler Hayward. ==References== {{Gallery|Tyler Hayward/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} [[es:Tyler Hayward]] [[ru:Тайлер Хэйуорд]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:WandaVision Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Gray Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:S.W.O.R.D. Agents]] [[Category:S.W.O.R.D. Leaders]]
